content:
- Opened current task: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/39-task-logging-file-sink-backlog.md (NOW EXECUTE).
- Implemented bootstrap-level logging unit tests in src/logging/mod.rs covering:
  - file sink enabled without path => Misconfigured
  - file-only sink writes JSONL
  - stderr+file fanout still writes file
  - all sinks disabled => non-fatal (NullSink)
- Ran full required gates (all pass): make check, make test, make test-long, make lint.
  - Note: first make test attempt timed out due to compilation inside the Makefile 120s timeout when using throttled build env; rerun after build artifacts were warm passed.
- Marked task 39 done/passing in the task file, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, committed and pushed (d16cc5b).
- Updated AGENTS.md with a note about make test 120s timeout including compilation and avoiding forced CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 when compilation is needed.

- Next: pick up the next task from .ralph/current_tasks.md / .ralph/current_task.txt and follow the TO BE VERIFIED / NOW EXECUTE workflow.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md to choose next task.
- Searched for any <passes>false</passes> / <passing>false</passing>; none found.
- Found mandatory recurring meta-task (<passes>meta-task</passes>) at .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md.
- Wrote that path to .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Next: execute meta-task 18 (deep skeptical codebase quality verification).

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt and opened current task: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md (recurring meta-task).
- Enforced preflight model gate: .ralph/model.txt was normal_high; set it to deep_review and recorded a new preflight-only entry (2026-03-04 pass-4) in the task file.
- Next: with model now deep_review, start a fresh skeptical verification pass; use parallel subagents to audit code + test reality, then run make check / make test / make lint / make test-long, create bug/tasks for any findings, and finally reset model back to normal_high.

- Ran mandated startup progress read via .ralph/progress_read.sh.
- Scanned src/ and tests/ with ripgrep for forbidden patterns: unwrap/expect/panic/todo/unimplemented macros/usages plus clippy allow suppressions.
- No runtime forbidden macro/method usages found in src/ or tests/.
- Only hits were crate-level deny lints in src/lib.rs (clippy::unwrap_used, clippy::expect_used, clippy::panic, clippy::todo, clippy::unimplemented), which is compliant and desirable.
- No #[allow(clippy::...)] suppressions found in src/ or tests/.
- Next step: report clean findings with exact file references and recommend keeping deny list plus CI guard scans.

- audited src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs and tests/bdd_api_http.rs + tests/bdd_state_watch.rs for realism/flakiness/non-determinism
- key findings: best-effort fail-safe check can pass without all nodes converged; dual-primary window assertion ignores poll errors; no-quorum fencing cutoff uses permissive fixed allowance and weak timestamp fallback; BDD API tests are contract-level with fragile HTTP parsing and contains-based status checks
- next if continuing: convert findings into concrete patch ideas (strict all-node criteria in matrix test, fail-on-poll-error in split-brain windows, stronger no-quorum post-cutoff invariant, robust HTTP response parser + exact status assertions in bdd tests), then run targeted e2e/bdd tests

- Audited src/dcs/etcd_store.rs end-to-end for watch bootstrap/reconnect/timeout semantics plus related DCS worker/runtime usage.
- Found two high-impact correctness issues: (1) connect() startup timeout branch can deadlock by joining worker thread without first signaling shutdown when bootstrap takes >2s total; (2) reconnect/bootstrap appends fresh snapshot events to old queue, which can replay stale pre-disconnect puts and resurrect deleted keys.
- Verified current test coverage in src/dcs/etcd_store.rs only covers happy path, decode failure, put-if-absent, and unreachable endpoint; no compaction/cancel/reconnect/resnapshot/timeout-deadlock coverage exists.
- Added bug task via add-bug skill at .ralph/tasks/bugs/etcd-watch-bootstrap-startup-timeout-and-resnapshot-stale-events.md.
- Next if continuing: propose code patch for startup handshake + queue replacement/revision fencing, then add deterministic tests for slow bootstrap and reconnect-resnapshot stale-event suppression.

- Audited real-binary enforcement and optional test skipping paths as requested.
- Verified Makefile test/test-long wiring and scanned for PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES usage across repo; there are zero references to that env var in current code.
- Inspected src/test_harness/binaries.rs and all real-binary call sites. Real tests now fail fast on missing binaries (no silent return Ok skip at call sites), but binary checks only validate path existence.
- Identified concrete gap candidates:
  1) test-long can silently pass with stale/renamed filters because cargo test filter mode succeeds on zero matches and Makefile does not assert match count/exactness.
  2) test-long returns success when ULTRA_LONG_TESTS is empty (fail-open).
  3) expected env var gate PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES is absent, so any CI/user assumption around that knob is a no-op.
  4) require_real_binary accepts any existing path (including non-executable files or mocked wrappers), so authenticity/realness is not asserted beyond existence.
- Next: deliver final report with file paths, line references, severity ordering, and concrete hardening recommendations.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt -> .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md (meta-task).
- Verified preflight model is deep_review (.ralph/model.txt).
- Spawned parallel explorer subagents for skeptical scan: unwrap/panic/todo + clippy allow; real-binary enforcement; DCS etcd correctness; HA e2e + BDD realism.
- Key findings from subagents:
  - DCS etcd_store: potential connect startup hang (timeout then join while worker continues) + reconnect/resnapshot can replay stale queued events; bug file created at .ralph/tasks/bugs/etcd-watch-bootstrap-startup-timeout-and-resnapshot-stale-events.md.
  - Makefile test-long: can silently run 0 tests due to substring filter; needs exact-match presence check and --exact; empty ULTRA_LONG_TESTS is fail-open.
  - HA e2e: some helpers/logs claim "all nodes failsafe" but only best-effort; dual-primary window ignores polling errors; some fencing thresholds/time fallbacks could mask regressions.
  - No unwrap/expect/panic/todo/unimplemented found in src/ and tests/; no clippy allow suppressions found.
- Wrote a detailed pass-4 execution plan into the task file and marked it TO BE VERIFIED.
- Next: per workflow, stop here; the next pass must do a deep skeptical verification of the plan (alter at least one thing), then flip marker to NOW EXECUTE and implement.

- Reviewed plan section 2.2 and current Makefile test-long implementation.
- Verified with live command that cargo test filter mode can return success with 0 tests executed (`cargo test --all-targets __definitely_no_such_test_filter...` -> all harnesses report running 0 tests, exit code 0).
- Confirmed Makefile:test-long currently loops ULTRA_LONG_TESTS using substring filters only and has no preflight exact-presence guard; also empty ULTRA_LONG_TESTS exits success (fail-open).
- Prepared minimal fail-closed proposal: non-empty-by-default, one cargo --list preflight exact-check using grep -Fx for each configured test, and execution with -- --exact.
- Next if continuing: optionally implement patch in Makefile + update plan section 2.2 checklist text to explicitly call out concrete commands and override variable naming.

- Reviewed requested plan section 2.1 in .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md and cross-checked bug file + src/dcs/{etcd_store,store,worker}.rs.
- Confirmed two stated risks are real: connect() timeout branch joins worker without shutdown signaling; reconnect bootstrap appends snapshot events to existing queue.
- Found additional high-risk gap not explicitly captured in section 2.1: reconnect snapshot currently emits only PUT events for existing keys, so keys deleted during disconnect may remain stale in DcsCache forever unless explicit delete events are synthesized (cache is incremental and not reset).
- Prepared skeptical critique: tighten startup-timeout fix strategy (avoid vague "or do not join"), require deterministic tests without sleep-flake, add tombstone/resync tests, include compaction/cancel replay-order edge cases.
- Next: deliver concise findings-first review with specific plan-step edits and test matrix suggestions.

- Reviewed plan section 2.4 against concrete code in src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs and tests/bdd_*.rs.
- Confirmed false-pass risks are real: dual-primary window checker ignores poll failures, best-effort fail-safe helper is paired with all-node wording, and no-quorum fencing timestamp collection still falls back unix_now() to 0 in worker stats.
- Confirmed BDD HTTP tests still rely on status_line.contains("NNN") and read_to_end connection-close behavior across almost all request paths.
- Created focused bug tasks via add-bug skill:
  - .ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-ha-e2e-false-pass-via-best-effort-polling-and-timestamp-fallback.md
  - .ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-bdd-http-tests-false-pass-via-fragile-status-and-read-patterns.md
- Next: deliver a concise review to user with file path anchors, prioritized findings, and concrete plan/task split recommendations for section 2.4.

- Reviewed plan section 2.3 in .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md and inspected src/test_harness/binaries.rs plus related real-binary call sites/tests.
- Confirmed current real-binary gating is existence-only (path.exists()) and tests only cover missing/present, so non-executable files and directories can pass the gate.
- Confirmed broader harness code (pg16 spawn, etcd spawn) also uses exists-only checks; true exec validation happens later at spawn time and can fail less clearly.
- Identified platform constraints: hardcoded Linux-style .tools paths and etcd filename, installers are Linux-only and postgres installer is Alma/RHEL-specific; no windows/mac path variant in binary helper.
- Next: provide user-facing review with severity-ranked findings, concrete plan text edits for section 2.3, and specific low-flake tests (metadata checks + optional bounded --version probe strategy).

- Opened `.ralph/current_task.txt` -> `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md` (meta-task 18) and confirmed it was in `TO BE VERIFIED` state.
- Ran deep skeptical verification of the pass-4 plan using parallel explorer subagents focused on: etcd DCS correctness, Makefile `test-long`, real-binary validation, and HA e2e/BDD false-pass risks.
- Key plan corrections found:
  - Etcd reconnect correctness is broader than queued-event replay: bootstrap snapshot enqueues only PUTs and does not delete missing keys, so `DcsCache` can retain ghost leader/member/switchover/init_lock across reconnect unless we add explicit resync/reset semantics.
  - `EtcdDcsStore::connect` startup timeout hang is caused by joining a worker thread that can continue running long-lived after the caller times out; fix must explicitly shut the worker down on startup timeout before joining.
  - `make test-long` can pass while running zero tests (cargo filter + exit 0) and is currently fail-open when `ULTRA_LONG_TESTS` is empty.
  - `require_real_binary` is existence-only and can be satisfied by non-executable files/dirs; related harness preflights also use `exists()`.
  - HA e2e and BDD HTTP tests have specific fail-open patterns; subagent created two bug files capturing anchors.
- Updated the meta-task pass-4 plan in `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md`:
  - Expanded 2.1 to include resync/reset semantics + stronger tests.
  - Tightened 2.2 to fail-closed + exact-match via `-- --list` + `grep -Fx` + `--exact`, and added `ALLOW_EMPTY_ULTRA_LONG_TESTS` override.
  - Tightened 2.3 to require regular file + (Unix) exec bit, updated tests and call sites.
  - Adjusted 2.4 to reference already-created bug tasks for follow-up.
  - Replaced `TO BE VERIFIED` with `NOW EXECUTE`.
- Next: do NOT explore; execute the updated plan as written (fix 2.1/2.2/2.3, create evidence dir, run `make check`, `make test`, `make lint`, `make test-long`).

- Executed meta-task pass-4 plan: implemented etcd watch bootstrap fixes + reconnect reset semantics, hardened real-binary validation, and made `make test-long` fail-closed with exact-match preflight.
- Added unit/integration coverage for etcd connect startup timeout and reconnect reset; introduced `WatchOp::Reset` to clear cached DCS records on reconnect while preserving config.
- Ran full gates with evidence logs: `make check`, `make test`, `make lint`, `make test-long` all green (plus reruns after final test tweak).
- Next: run `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, commit + push, then switch away from this meta-task.
